MINI MINUTES: Appearances: pETER sATO, eSQ., 310.623.1926, FOR PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Consent Judgment IS GRANTED. SEE WRITTEN ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED AFTER CONCLUSION OF HEARING. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUBEN YEROUSHALMI, TEL. NO. (310) 623-1926 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Motion To Approve And Consent Judgment is continued to February 7, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. to address the issues pointed out by the court such as the Consent Judgment should be dated and signed by all parties and no words should be cut off. The new agreement should also be signed. Counsel to provide notice of the new hearing date. The new pleading should also indicate that it contains the same substance of the materials that were earlier presented in court. Judge: Marla J.
